license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdrri556
title: Identification of interacting proteins using proximity-dependent biotinylation with BioID2 in Trypanosoma brucei
author: Jan Pyrih

steps_raw.instruction: resuspend cell pellets in 50 ml of SBG and spin again at same condition
resuspend cell pellet in 3 ml of DTE
Add 0,5 ml of 60% Sucrose, mix the sample in dounce and transfer it into 3 eppendorf tubes
Spin down: 16,000x g, 10min, 4°C
Resuspend all 3 pellets in 1,5 ml of STM (merge everything in 2 ml eppendorf tubes)
Pipette MgCl 2 to a final concentration 5 mM, CaCl 2 to a final concentration 0.5 mM and DNase to a final concentration 5ug/ml
Incubate on ice for 20 minute
STE Wash 1,5 ml, 3x, 12,000x g, 10 min, 4°C
Resuspend pellets in 1,8 ml of Boiling Buffer, 10 minutes, 80°C
Spin down: 16,000x g, 10min, 20°C
Meanwhile wash 50 ul of dynabeads per sample 2x times with 1ml of Incubation buffer, each time 5 minutes
Mix supernatants from step 14 with 18 ml of Incubation Buffer (supplemented with ROCHE Complete protease inhibitors EDTA free)
Add 50 uL of washed dynebeads resuspended in incubation buffer from step 15 per sample (final 0.5 mg per sample) (Dynabeads™ MyOne™ Streptavidin C1 -10 mg/ml)
Roll for 2 hours at RT at falcon tubes, then place overnight at fridge
Wash the beads 3 times with 1,5 ml of Boiling buffer
Wash the beads 3 times with 1,5 ml of Incubation buffer
Remove all liquid, put dry dynabeads into to the -80 freezer
Spin down 3 x10 9 cells for each replicate – 1500x g, 15min, 4°C
Dounce – 10 strokes
Tag you protein of interest with linker_BioID2 tag sequence according to attached pptx file ProtocolsIO.pptx
SBG recipe: 150 mM NaCl 20 mM Glucose 20 mM NaH 2 PO 4 pH 7.9
DTE recipe: TRIS 1 mM EDTA 1 mM pH 8.0
STM recipe Sucrose 250 mM Tris, pH 8.0 20 mM MgCl 2 2mM
snap freeze with liquid nitrogen and store in -80°C until needed or proceed directly to Dynabeads protein isolation
Boiling buffer recipe: TRIS 50 mM EDTA 1mM SDS 1% pH 7.4
Incubation buffer recipe: NaCl 150 mM TRIS 50 mM EDTA 5mM TRITON X-100 1% pH 7.4
Supplement SDM-79 media with 100 uM Biotin over night
Screen for a successful biotinylation in the cells supplemented with biotin on IFA using fluorescent Alexa-488-streptavidin
